Record.signature: type Record<K extends keyof any, T> = { [P in K]: T }
Record.description: Constructs an object type whose property keys are K and values are T.

Partial.signature: type Partial<T> = { [P in keyof T]?: T[P] }
Partial.description: Makes all properties in T optional.

Required.signature: type Required<T> = { [P in keyof T]-?: T[P] }
Required.description: Makes all properties in T required.

Readonly.signature: type Readonly<T> = { readonly [P in keyof T]: T[P] }
Readonly.description: Makes all properties in T readonly.

Pick.signature: type Pick<T, K extends keyof T> = { [P in K]: T[P] }
Pick.description: Constructs a type by picking properties K from T.

Omit.signature: type Omit<T, K extends keyof any> = Pick<T, Exclude<keyof T, K>>
Omit.description: Constructs a type by removing properties K from T.

Exclude.signature: type Exclude<T, U> = T extends U ? never : T
Exclude.description: Excludes from T those types assignable to U.

Extract.signature: type Extract<T, U> = T extends U ? T : never
Extract.description: Extracts from T those types assignable to U.

NonNullable.description: Excludes null and undefined from T.

ReturnType.signature: type ReturnType<T extends (...args: any) => any> = T extends (...args: any) => infer R ? R : any
ReturnType.description: Obtains the return type of function type T.

Parameters.signature: type Parameters<T extends (...args: any) => any> = T extends (...args: infer P) => any ? P : never
Parameters.description: Obtains parameter types of function type T as a tuple.

ConstructorParameters.signature: type ConstructorParameters<T extends abstract new (...args: any) => any> = T extends abstract new (...args: infer P) => any ? P : never
ConstructorParameters.description: Extracts parameter types from a constructor function type.

InstanceType.signature: type InstanceType<T extends abstract new (...args: any) => any> = T extends abstract new (...args: any) => infer R ? R : any
InstanceType.description: Constructs the instance type of a constructor function type.

Awaited.signature: type Awaited<T> = T extends null | undefined ? T : T extends object & { then(onfulfilled: infer F, ...args: infer _): any } ? F extends ((value: infer V, ...args: infer _) => any) ? Awaited<V> : never : T
Awaited.description: Recursively unwraps Promise types. Added in TypeScript 4.5.

ThisType.description: Marker for contextual this type. Only works with --noImplicitThis.

Uppercase.description: Converts string literal type to uppercase.

Lowercase.description: Converts string literal type to lowercase.

Capitalize.description: Capitalizes first character of string literal type.

Uncapitalize.description: Uncapitalizes first character of string literal type.

NoInfer.description: Blocks inference at this position. TypeScript 5.4+.

ReadonlyArray.description: An array that cannot be mutated. No push, pop, splice, etc.

join.description: Joins all elements into a string.

slice.description: Returns a section of an array.

indexOf.description: Returns the first index of the element, or -1.

includes.description: Determines whether the array includes a certain element.

map.signature: map<U>(callbackfn: (value: T, index: number, array: readonly T[]) => U): U[]
map.description: Calls a function on each element and returns a new array.

filter.signature: filter(predicate: (value: T, index: number) => boolean): T[]
filter.description: Returns elements that meet the condition.

reduce.signature: reduce<U>(callbackfn: (prev: U, cur: T, idx: number) => U, initialValue: U): U
reduce.description: Reduces the array to a single value.

find.signature: find(predicate: (value: T, index: number) => boolean): T | undefined
find.description: Returns the first element satisfying the predicate.

every.signature: every(predicate: (value: T, index: number) => boolean): boolean
every.description: Tests whether all elements pass the predicate.

some.signature: some(predicate: (value: T, index: number) => boolean): boolean
some.description: Tests whether any element passes the predicate.

Promise.description: Represents the eventual completion or failure of an asynchronous operation. Inherits all JavaScript Promise features with full type safety.

then.signature: then<TResult1 = T, TResult2 = never>(onfulfilled?: (value: T) => TResult1 | PromiseLike<TResult1>, onrejected?: (reason: any) => TResult2 | PromiseLike<TResult2>): Promise<TResult1 | TResult2>
then.description: Attaches callbacks for resolution and/or rejection.

catch.signature: catch<TResult = never>(onrejected?: (reason: any) => TResult | PromiseLike<TResult>): Promise<T | TResult>
catch.description: Attaches a callback for rejection only.

finally.description: Attaches a callback invoked when the Promise is settled.

Disposable.description: TypeScript 5.2+ — Interface for the using declaration. Implement Symbol.dispose for automatic cleanup.

AsyncDisposable.description: TypeScript 5.2+ — Interface for the await using declaration. Implement Symbol.asyncDispose for async resource cleanup.
